title: Refer. Get Paid.
description: Earn at least 10% of the fees your friends pay. You can get up to $1,000 a month.

code.title: Your invite link
code.subtitle: Share your link or code. Anyone who signs up with it is linked to you.
code.shareText: Save in USDC and join savings circles on MoolaHub. Use my link to get started:
code.editHint: Pick 4 to 15 letters or numbers. This is what friends type to join through you.
code.confirmBody: Your old code stops working right away. Anyone who still has your old link won't be counted as your referral.

errors.format: Use 4 to 15 letters or numbers, with no spaces.

tier.title: Your earning tier
tier.subtitle: The more active savers you refer, the bigger your share of the fees.
tier.maxed: You've reached the top tier, the maximum {{rate}}% share.

withdraw.title: Withdraw earnings
withdraw.subtitle: Move your commission to your wallet.
withdraw.success: Withdrawal on its way to your wallet.

locked.title: Withdrawals unlock at {{min}}
locked.monthlyReached: You've hit your {{cap}} limit for this month. It resets on the 1st.

errors.max: You can withdraw at most {{amount}} right now.
errors.monthly: That would pass your {{cap}} monthly limit. You have {{amount}} left this month.

referrals.title: Your referrals
referrals.subtitle: Everyone you've brought to MoolaHub.
referrals.empty: No referrals yet. Share your link to start earning.

share.title: Send your referral code
share.desc: Share your code or link with friends and family so they can join MoolaHub.

save.title: Let them save
save.desc: When they sign up and keep saving, you earn a share of the fees they pay. The more they save, the more you earn.

earn.title: Get earnings
earn.desc: Keep at least {{rate}}% of those fees, up to $1,000 a month.

limits.note: Withdrawals: minimum {{min}} per withdrawal, up to {{max}} each calendar month.

signup.invited: Invite applied. You're joining through a friend.
